notes: Plan aligns well with existing evolution architecture — CurveParams extension and evolveParams changes follow the established harmonic pattern exactly.

Shader insertion points are correctly identified: radialScale after pos=position, twist multiplication at line 59, noiseFrequency in layeredNoise calls at lines 83-85, fieldSpread before breathing at line 98.
The types.ts entry correctly notes no changes needed since FrameState.params is typed as VisualParams which will pick up the new fields automatically.
Conservative amplitude ranges and the multiplicative-identity default of 1.0 are good choices — existing behaviour is preserved when evolution hasn't kicked in.
Step 7 correctly identifies the downstream test fixtures that need updating (evolution, mappings, pointCloud, pointCloudWarp, particleField, waveField).
Minor: the plan lists particleField and waveField as CPU-side structural changes (step 5), which is correct — only pointCloud uses the GPU shader path for these new uniforms.
warnings: The T-012-12 passthrough test update (step 7) needs care: structureComplexity is still pass-through but the four new fields are evolved — ensure the test assertion is updated to reflect exactly which fields pass through and which are evolved.

The reduced-motion risk note is valid: radialScale and fieldSpread multiply base position (not velocity), so they bypass uMotionAmplitude. If testers flag this, attenuating evolution amplitude by motionAmplitude in evolveParams is the right fix — consider adding a TODO comment in the code for this.
